title: Memory, Context Windows, Compaction, and Retrieval · Failure Case: Compaction
summary: Keep a long-running agent grounded without unlimited history. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops compaction increment in a context and durable-memory policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compact history into goal, decisions, evidence, unresolved work, and restart commands.
Retrieve the smallest authoritative evidence set for the next decision.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
